recommendations.title: Redline
recommendations.overview: A daredevil driver is determined to compete in Redline, the most popular race in the galaxy. The race only occurs every five years, but in order to participate he must overcome the mafia, the government and even love.

recommendations.title: Lupin the 3rd: Goemon's Blood Spray
recommendations.overview: A yakuza boss hires Goemon Ishikawa, a modern day samurai, to protect him aboard his cruise ship casino. Everything goes sideways when the famous thief, Lupin the Third, tries to rob the vessel. Lupin's being hunted by a powerful and mysterious man:

recommendations.title: Lupin the IIIrd: Fujiko's Lie
recommendations.overview: Fujiko Mine, the devastating femme fatale whose only loyalty is to her desire, befriends a young boy whose late father hid away a fortune.  A killer is on the boy's trail and it's up to Fujiko to stop him: but where do her interests really lie?

recommendations.title: World Record
recommendations.overview: A record-breaking competitive runner begins to stretch the limits of the Matrix. Part of the Animatrix collection of animated shorts set in the Matrix universe.

recommendations.title: The Animatrix
recommendations.overview: Straight from the creators of the groundbreaking Matrix trilogy, this collection of short animated films from the world's leading anime directors fuses computer graphics and Japanese anime to provide the background of the Matrix universe and the conf
recommendations.director: Koji Morimoto, Takeshi Koike, Shinichiro Watanabe, Andrew R. Jones, Yoshiaki Kawajiri, Mahiro Maeda, Peter Chung

recommendations.title: Lupin the Third: Operation: Return the Treasure
recommendations.genres: Animation, TV Movie, Action, Comedy, Crime
recommendations.overview: After robbing a Moscow casino right under Zenigata's nose, Lupin is given a job to return 6 treasures to their original areas for an old friend of his, so Lupin can receive an even better treasure to gain.

recommendations.title: One Piece: Stampede
recommendations.overview: The world's boldest buccaneers set sail for the great Pirate Festival, where the Straw Hats join a mad-dash race to find Gol D. Roger's treasure. There's just one little problem: An old member of Roger's crew has a sinister score to settle.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The Castle of Cagliostro
recommendations.overview: After a successful robbery leaves famed thief Lupin the Third and his partner Jigen with nothing but a large amount of expertly crafted counterfeit bills, he decides to track down the forgers responsible—and steal any other treasures he may find in t

recommendations.title: One Piece: Heart of Gold
